title: 2026-06-05 Shino Seoul School Trip Teal
summary: Five-image young Shino character memory album in Seoul, using transformative teal across Hongik Univ. Station transfer, Mangwon Market snack laugh, Hongdae Red Road street music, Euljiro Printing Alley zine notes, and an Ikseon-dong Hanok Street cafe.
summaryJa: ソウルのアルバム。構成は移動、マーケット、街歩き、bookstore-library。

images.alt: Young Shino, age 17, in Seoul Hongik University Station during a wholesome high-school trip memory, holding a small route card and folding fan while wearing a white tee, light teal windbreaker, straight denim trousers, clean sneakers, and a backpack with a fish keychain
images.title: 01 Transit Hongik Univ. Station route card
images.locationDetail: Seoul Hongik University Station during a wholesome high-school trip memory

images.alt: Young Shino, age 17, at Seoul Mangwon Market after rain, stepping through a puddle and laughing toward a classmate while holding a snack bag, wearing an ivory short-sleeve shirt, teal culotte pants, light gray cardigan tied at the waist, white crew socks, sneakers, and a backpack with fish charms
images.title: 02 Market Mangwon puddle snack

images.alt: Young Shino, age 17, at Seoul Hongdae Red Road watching an acoustic street performance from a public sidewalk, softly clapping with absorbed delight while wearing a pale lavender overshirt, white tee, loose khaki trousers, teal canvas mini tote with fish charm, and sneakers
images.title: 03 Music Hongdae Red Road busking

images.alt: Young Shino, age 17, in Seoul Euljiro Printing Alley, writing tiny travel notes about fish shapes and street sounds while comparing small zines, wearing a light gray hoodie, teal pleated culotte skirt over opaque leggings, white sneakers, and a backpack with a fish charm
images.title: 04 Bookstore Euljiro printing alley zine

images.alt: Young Shino, age 17, at an Ikseon-dong Hanok Street cafe in Seoul after rain, laughing warmly while showing a tiny travel photo or fish-shaped sticker in her notebook, wearing an ivory tee, short light denim jacket, transformative-teal skort, white ankle socks, sneakers, teal hair clip, and a backpack with a fish charm
images.title: 05 Weekend Ikseon-dong cafe teal skort
images.locationDetail: Ikseon-dong Hanok Street cafe in Seoul
